data.name: Hentai Weekend
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Weekend - 解開不同難度的謎題。最好的放鬆方式。每位玩家都有三種難度模式。簡單適合想快速完成多個關卡的玩家，中等更具挑戰性並需專注，困難則為經驗豐富的玩家設計。如果太難，只需按下自動按鈕。遊戲允許將所有插畫儲存到電腦中。完成關卡可獲得成就，每個關卡都有自己的成就。

遊戲特色

  • 30 幅插圖

  • 30 項成就

  • 放鬆音樂

  • 3 種難度模式

data.short_description: Hentai Weekend - 工作太辛苦了嗎？該休息一下了。和美麗的女孩一起去度假吧！解謎並收集圖片，享受輕鬆的夜晚。選擇你喜歡的難度並測試你的專注力。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: 64-bit Windows 7, 64-bit Windows 8 (8.1) or 64-bit Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1 GB
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間

data.name: Hentai Weekend
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Weekend - Solve puzzles of varying difficulty. The best solution for relaxation. There are 3 difficulty modes for each player. Easy is perfect for those who like to quickly complete several levels. Medium is more challenging and requires attention. Hard is for the more experienced players. If things get tough, just press the auto button. The game allows you to save all your artwork to your computer. Earn achievements by completing levels, and each level has its own achievement.

Game Features

  • 30 illustrations

  • 30 achievements

  • Relaxing music

  • 3 difficulty modes

data.short_description: Hentai Weekend - Working too much? You need to rest. Go on vacation with beautiful women! Solve puzzles and collect pictures. A great way to spend the evening. Choose your favorite difficulty level and test your attentiveness.
